memberdef.argsstring: (size_t num_phases, size_t num_taps, double atten, double pb, double sb)
memberdef.name: _build_bank

memberdef.argsstring: (size_t num_phases, double atten, double pb, double sb)
memberdef.name: _kaiser_num_taps

memberdef.argsstring: (size_t num_phases, size_t num_taps, float *bank_owned, double rate)
memberdef.name: _create_from_bank

memberdef.argsstring: (size_t num_phases, size_t num_taps, const float *bank, double rate)
memberdef.name: resamp_create_custom

detaileddescription.para: User-supplied bank, shape num_phases × num_taps, row-major. num_phases must be a power of two.
Free all resources. NULL is a no-op.
Zero phase accumulator, ctrl accumulator, and delay line. Rate and bank are preserved.
Update rate and recompute phase_inc. Accumulator phase and delay line are preserved. Switching between interp and decim modes requires a new create() + destroy() pair.

memberdef.argsstring: (resamp_state_t *s, const float _Complex *in, size_t num_in, float _Complex *out, size_t max_out)
memberdef.name: interp_execute

memberdef.argsstring: (resamp_state_t *s, const float _Complex *in, size_t num_in, float _Complex *out, size_t max_out)
memberdef.name: decim_execute

memberdef.argsstring: (resamp_state_t *s, const float _Complex *in, size_t num_in, float _Complex *out, size_t max_out)
memberdef.name: resamp_execute

briefdescription.para: Resample a block of CF32 samples (fixed rate).

memberdef.argsstring: (resamp_state_t *s, const float _Complex *in, const float _Complex *ctrl, size_t num_in, float _Complex *out, size_t max_out)
memberdef.name: resamp_execute_ctrl

briefdescription.para: Resample with per-sample additive rate deviation.

detaileddescription.para: rate_i = base_rate + crealf(ctrl(i)). ctrl is treated as real-valued; only the real part of each element is used.
Output buffer: allocate ceil(num_in × (rate + max_ctrl)) samples.

parameterdescription.para: Rate deviations, parallel to in (float _Complex, real part only, length num_in).
Number of input samples (= length of ctrl).
